svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: var(--ge-adaptive-bg, #ffffff); color-scheme: light dark;

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(26, 26, 26)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));

path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(229, 204, 255)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(153, 51, 255));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 215px; height: 1px; padding-top: 55px; margin-left: 235px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: #000000; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));
fill: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(204, 229, 255)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(0, 127, 255));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 215px; height: 1px; padding-top: 145px; margin-left: 235px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: #000000; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
